mapper.insert:
insert into agent_definition(id, name, definition_desc, first_rule, second_rule, third_skill, status, model, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.definitionDesc}, #{entity.firstRule}, #{entity.secondRule}, #{entity.thirdSkill}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
